context.role: Flying obstacle that player must duck under or time jump carefully
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=50px (ground+50px), scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Mid-air obstacle appearing after score 200+, requires ducking to avoid (50% of pterodactyl spawns)

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon with long beak, spread wings in flight pose

animation.description: Frame 1: wings up position, Frame 2: wings down position, flapping animation

visual_specification.details: Flying pterodactyl at 50px height, wing flapping animation, hitbox 89x77px (3px margin from sprite)

relationships.shared_with: Same sprite and animation as pterodactyl_high, only Y position differs
relationships.differences_from: pterodactyl_high spawns at y=80px, pterodactyl_low at y=50px (requires ducking)

explicit_negations: No particle effects or motion blur
